title: Sign in and reach the dashboard lead list
description: Verifies a team member can sign in and reach the dashboard where a lead list is displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user lands on the dashboard
Verify a list of leads is displayed

title: Send outreach email from lead detail after reviewing or editing the draft
description: Verifies an authenticated user can open a lead detail, compose or edit the outreach draft, send the email, and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Open the lead details view
Initiate email outreach for the lead
Edit the email body with a unique phrase: Edited draft {{UNIQUE_TOKEN}}
Send the outreach email
Verify a send success confirmation is visible

title: Dashboard access requires authentication
description: Verifies an unauthenticated user attempting to access the dashboard is redirected to sign-in.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the user is redirected to the sign-in page

title: Open lead detail from dashboard after sign-in
description: Verifies a signed-in user can open a lead detail page from the dashboard lead list.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click a lead from the lead list to open its details
Verify the lead detail view is displayed
Verify outreach actions are available on the lead detail view

title: Open lead detail and confirm outreach actions are available
description: Verifies a user can navigate from the dashboard to a lead detail page and see outreach actions ready to use.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Click a lead from the lead list to open its details
Verify the lead detail view is displayed
Verify outreach actions are available on the lead detail view

title: CSV import adds new leads to the dashboard list
description: Verifies a user can import leads via CSV and newly imported leads appear in the dashboard list.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Start a CSV import from the dashboard
Complete the required column mapping or confirmation
Confirm the import
Verify the dashboard lead list includes newly imported leads

title: Trigger AI processing for selected leads and view classification and suggestion
description: Verifies a user can select leads, run AI processing, and then see each processed lead’s Qualified/Discarded classification and a suggested outreach message.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select multiple leads from the lead list
Trigger AI processing for the selected leads
Verify the selected leads display an AI classification and a suggested outreach message

title: Update lead status from the dashboard list
description: Verifies a user can change a lead’s qualification or status from the dashboard and the list reflects the update.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Select a lead in the list
Update the lead qualification or status from the list controls
Verify the lead’s updated status is reflected in the dashboard list

title: Fix validation errors and successfully send outreach from the same draft
description: Verifies that after validation errors for empty subject/body, the user can correct the fields and then successfully send the outreach email.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Open the lead details view
Initiate email outreach for the lead
Clear the email subject field
Clear the email body field
Send the outreach email
Fill Valid outreach subject {{UNIQUE_TOKEN}} into the email subject field
Fill Valid outreach body {{UNIQUE_TOKEN}} into the email body field
Send the outreach email
Verify a send success confirmation is visible

title: Send outreach email uses the edited draft content
description: Verifies that when the user edits the outreach draft and sends it, the sent confirmation view reflects that the edited content was used.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Open the lead details view
Initiate email outreach for the lead
Edit the email body with a unique phrase: Final message {{UNIQUE_TOKEN}}
Send the outreach email
Verify the post-send confirmation displays the unique phrase Final message {{UNIQUE_TOKEN}}

title: Import requires required column mapping/confirmation before proceeding
description: Verifies the import flow blocks confirmation until required columns are mapped or confirmed.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Start a CSV import from the dashboard
Attempt to proceed without completing required column mapping or confirmation
Verify a validation error is visible indicating required mapping or confirmation is needed

title: Edit AI-suggested outreach message and keep edits after saving
description: Verifies a user can edit the AI-generated suggested message for a lead and the edited version remains visible after saving/closing the editor.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Open the lead details view
Trigger AI processing for this lead if no AI suggestion is present
Edit the suggested outreach message content
Verify the edited outreach message content is displayed as the current suggestion

title: Open processed lead detail and review AI classification and suggestion in detail view
description: Verifies that after AI processing, opening a lead detail page shows the AI classification and suggested message for that lead.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Trigger AI processing for the selected lead
Open the lead details view
Verify the lead detail view displays an AI classification and a suggested outreach message

title: Sort or filter the dashboard lead list
description: Verifies a user can apply sorting or filtering to narrow the dashboard lead list.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Apply a filter or sort option on the lead list
Verify the lead list updates to reflect the applied filter or sort

title: Process only a chosen subset of leads without updating unselected leads
description: Verifies AI processing applies only to the user-selected subset of leads and leaves unselected leads unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a single lead from the lead list
Trigger AI processing for the selected lead
Verify only the selected lead shows newly displayed AI classification and suggested message

title: Invalid credentials are rejected
description: Verifies entering invalid credentials does not sign the user in and shows an error state.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill invalid@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Verify the user remains on the sign-in flow
Verify an authentication error is visible

title: Prevent repeated AI processing while processing is in progress
description: Verifies the UI prevents duplicate AI processing submissions by disabling processing controls or showing a loading state while processing runs.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select multiple leads from the lead list
Trigger AI processing for the selected leads
Verify the AI processing control becomes disabled or a processing state is shown while processing is in progress

title: Canceling the import returns to the dashboard without adding leads
description: Verifies a user can exit the CSV import flow and no new leads are added to the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the sign-in form
Start a CSV import from the dashboard
Cancel or close the import flow
Verify the user is back on the dashboard
Verify no newly imported leads appear in the lead list

title: Block sending outreach email when body is empty
description: Verifies that attempting to send an outreach email with an empty body shows a validation error and keeps the user on the draft.

steps.description: Navigate to /handler/sign-in
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the sign-in form
Navigate to /dashboard
Select a lead from the lead list
Open the lead details view
Initiate email outreach for the lead
Clear the email body field
Send the outreach email
Verify a body validation error is visible and the draft remains open
